Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action Of Joseph Alan Hyams For Failure To Attend Court Ordered Medical Examination
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant forthwith to reschedule his examination with Dr. Carmo D. Trinidade. The examination shall be completed by June 27, 2005. Failure to appear at the court-ordered examination was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1251.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. The motion for terminating sanctions is continued to July 8, 2005.

If either party contests the tentative ruling, notice shall be given to opposing counsel pursuant to San Francisco Superior Court Rule 8.3. If notice is given, oral argument on the motion will be on June 21, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 610. JUDGE: Thomas J. Mellon. Dept. 514
